caption: A man is seated in a recording studio, positioned behind a large computer monitor that partially obscures the left side of the frame. He is wearing a grey t-shirt and professional over-ear headphones. A large condenser microphone on a boom arm is positioned directly in front of his face. To his right, a black acoustic foam panel with vertical ridges covers the wall. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking, his facial expressions and mouth movements shifting as he talks. His gaze alternates slightly, looking toward the monitor and then toward the space in front of him. The background and equipment, including the monitor, microphone, and wall panels, remain static while only the man's facial movements change as he continues his conversation.
